data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of extension uninstall revoking access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of the scenario where 'Extension uninstall revokes all access', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any evidence of the uninstall process or its effects on access rights, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of the extension uninstall process and its impact on access.
